title: Measles and rubella weekly monitoring reports - Canada.ca
content:
## Measles and rubella weekly monitoring reports
As of March 21, 2025, weekly surveillance reports and monitoring maps for measles and rubella in Canada are now available in an interactive dashboard.
View interactive measles and rubella data
Browse previous weekly reports on measles and rubella.
